response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of hands-on fullstack experience, including recent production work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, plus current AI-agent and MCP tooling development that directly matches the role's AI agent requirement. Strong testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses) and demonstrated architecture ownership. Gaps are mostly around specific stack items — no Nest.js or Kotlin exposure is evident, and cloud/Kubernetes experience appears present but not deep — all learnable given the breadth shown.
strengths: Deep fullstack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple recent roles
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work, a rare and explicitly required skill
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, authored test libraries, taught courses)
concerns: No evident Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework for the role
Kotlin/Java exposure is limited and dated relative to the secondary stack needs
Significant portion of career in niche DLang work less transferable to this stack
